listings.title: ***Vintage Reel to Reel Tape deck!! ***
listings.body: Realistic 909b reel to reel tape deck made by tandy corp. which was Radio Shack. This looks to be in excellent condition. It belonged to my dad and worked when last used. I have no idea how to operate it but it powers on. Priced lower than Ebay.

listings.title: PABLO NERUDA POEMS AND ILLUSTRATIONS
listings.body: PABLO NERUDA BOOK 66 YEARS OLD.  Editorial lords cochrane Santiago De Chile 1970.139 pages of poems & illustrations. pickup or mail.

listings.title: 2 Legged Steel Slings w Hooks
listings.body: 1/2" x 3' Steel cable hooks With ring Thimbled eyes

listings.title: Two steel slings - 1/2" x 3'
listings.body: Two steel slings 1/2" x 3' Priced per pair Like new condition

listings.title: Eye Bolts variety
listings.body: Variety of eye bolts ranging from 1/4" to 3/4"

listings.title: PS5 with games and headset
listings.body: Selling a PlayStation 5 bundle in great condition. Everything shown in the photo is included. Includes: PS5 console Multiple DualSense controllers PS5 headset PS5 games shown in photo Charging dock/accessories Console works great and is ready to play. Serious buyers only. Please contact me first before purchasing so we can discuss price, condition, availability, and pickup/shipping details.

listings.title: Xbox Lot / Gaming PC
listings.body: Selling multiple Xbox consoles, gaming PCs, and controllers shown in the photo. Everything is being sold as-is and can be discussed individually or as a bundle. Included are: Xbox One S Xbox 360 consoles Original Xbox (Halo edition + transparent green Xbox) Multiple Xbox controllers Gaming PCs/custom towers Accessories and cables shown Serious buyers only. Please contact me first before purchasing so we can discuss availability, pricing, condition, and pickup/shipping details. Do not send payment before speaking with me directly.

listings.title: Xbox Series X w/ Charger
listings.body: Selling an Xbox Series X with controller and charger included. Console works great and comes with everything needed to play right away. Please contact me first before purchasing so we can discuss the condition, price, availability, and pickup/shipping details. Serious buyers only.
